mapper.select: SELECT er.*, c.id as comp_id, c.name as comp_name, c.formula as comp_formula, c.category as comp_category, p.id as proc_id, p.name as proc_name, p.process_type as proc_type, p.temperature as proc_temperature, p.pressure as proc_pressure, p.duration as proc_duration, t.team_name FROM experiment_records er LEFT JOIN compositions c ON er.composition_id = c.id LEFT JOIN processes p ON er.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN teams t ON er.team_id = t.id WHERE er.id = #{id}

SELECT er.*, c.id as comp_id, c.name as comp_name, c.formula as comp_formula, c.category as comp_category, p.id as proc_id, p.name as proc_name, p.process_type as proc_type, p.temperature as proc_temperature, p.pressure as proc_pressure, p.duration as proc_duration, t.team_name FROM experiment_records er LEFT JOIN compositions c ON er.composition_id = c.id LEFT JOIN processes p ON er.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN teams t ON er.team_id = t.id WHERE er.record_number = #{recordNumber}
